description:
A tool for setting the artwork of your Steam library.


New Features
- added ability to filter games by if they're missing art or not (8dbe295)
- added filter for installed games (41a2bde)
- added pagination (3f66851)
- added the ability to include alternate app types (3a4064e)
Bug Fixes
- bulk editing missing only works again (fd424bc)
- filtering grids now responds properly to changes (untagged filter) (650775f)
- list view now renders properly (28b58ee)
- properly disable grid options when no sgdb api key is present (a2a4df6)
